---
title: "resazurin_analysis"
author: "Samuel Gurr"
date: "2026-03-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
# SET WORKING DIRECTORY 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/gurrs/Documents/6_Github_repositories/GurrLab/Resazurin_Pacific_oysters/RAnalysis") # Sam's
#knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/samuel.gurr/Documents/Github_repositories/EAD-ASEB-Airradians_Popgen_OA/") # Sam's
```


```{r}
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
```


```{r}
resaz_72hpf_filenames <- list.files("Data/20260320_72hpf/", pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)
resaz_72hpf_filenames
# Read each file into a named list
xlsx_list <- setNames(
  lapply(resaz_72hpf_filenames, read_excel),
  str_remove(basename(resaz_72hpf_filenames), "\\.xlsx$")
)


df <- df[, -c(1:2)]   # drop first 2 columns if needed
colnames(df) <- c("id", "date", "value")

covert_to_df <- function (file_in) {
                          file_out <- as.data.frame(file_in[-c(1:26), -c(1,15)]) # drop first columns and first 26 rows
                          colnames(file_out) <- c("Row", "col1", "col2", "col3", "col4", "col5", "col6",
                                                       "col7", "col8", "col9", "col10", "col11", "col12")
                          
                          file_out <- file_out %>%  
                              tidyr::pivot_longer(
                                cols = -Row,
                                names_to = "column_id",
                                values_to = "flourescence"
                              )
                          
                          return(file_out)
                        }

plate1_high_T0_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate1_high_T0_260320_131142) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T0", 
                                                                                                      plate = "1", 
                                                                                                      well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))
plate1_high_T1_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate1_high_T1_260320_1424) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T1", 
                                                                                                    plate = "1", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))
plate1_high_T2_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate1_high_T2_260320_1529) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T2", 
                                                                                                    plate = "1", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))
plate1_high_T3_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate1_high_T3_260320_1640) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T3", 
                                                                                                    plate = "1", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))
plate1_high_T4_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate1_high_T4_260320_1747) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T4", 
                                                                                                    plate = "1", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))






plate2_high_T0_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate2_high_T0_260320_1316) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T0", 
                                                                                                      plate = "2", 
                                                                                                      well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))

plate2_high_T1_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate2_high_T1_260320_1420) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T1", 
                                                                                                    plate = "2", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))

plate2_high_T2_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate2_high_T2_260320_1532) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T2", 
                                                                                                    plate = "2", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))
plate2_high_T3_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate2_high_T3_260320_1637) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T3", 
                                                                                                    plate = "2", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))
plate2_high_T4_260320 <- covert_to_df(xlsx_list$Resaz_plate2_high_T4_260320_1743) %>% dplyr::mutate(time = "T4", 
                                                                                                    plate = "2", 
                                                                                                    well = paste0(Row,substr(column_id,4,5)))



plate1_high_master <- rbind(plate1_high_T0_260320, plate1_high_T1_260320, plate1_high_T3_260320, plate1_high_T4_260320)
plate2_high_master <- rbind(plate2_high_T0_260320, plate2_high_T1_260320, plate2_high_T3_260320, plate2_high_T4_260320)

high_master       <- rbind(plate1_high_master, plate2_high_master) %>% 
                        dplyr::mutate(EBV_cat = case_when(column_id %in% c("col1", "col2", "col3", "col4", "col5", "col6") ~ 'Low',
                                                         column_id  %in% c("col7", "col8", "col9", "col10", "col11", "col12") ~ 'High'))
                                      

high_master_summ  <- Rmisc:: summarySE(
                                data = (high_master %>% dplyr::filter(!Row %in% 'H')),
                                measurevar = "flourescence",
                                groupvars = c("column_id", "time" , "EBV_cat")
)


blank_master_summ  <- Rmisc:: summarySE(
                                data = (high_master %>% dplyr::filter(Row %in% 'H')),
                                measurevar = "flourescence",
                                groupvars = c("time")
)


# plate2_high_summ <- Rmisc:: summarySE(
#                                 data = (plate2_high_master %>% dplyr::filter(!Row %in% 'H')),
#                                 measurevar = "flourescence",
#                                 groupvars = c("column_id", "time", "EBV_cat")
# )


ggplot(high_master_summ, 
       aes(x = time, y = flourescence)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = flourescence - se, ymax = flourescence + se),
                width = 0.15) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~column_id)


ggplot(blank_master_summ, 
       aes(x = time, y = flourescence)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = flourescence - se, ymax = flourescence + se),
                width = 0.15) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +


       
```
